name: claws-skills
description: Local GitHub-Project automation skills: bootstrap a repo + project, plan a PRD into Ready tasks, and drive issues to PRs.

plugins.name: claws
plugins.description: Drive a GitHub Project board locally: init-project bootstraps the repo + project, plan decomposes a PRD into Ready tasks, work-on-pending picks up Ready cards, work-on-task takes an issue from Ready to In Review in its own worktree.
